async fn transfer_funds(
    accounts: &std::sync::Mutex<AccountStore>,
    from: u64,
    to: u64,
    amount: i64,
) {
    {
        let mut store = accounts.lock().unwrap();
        let from_balance = store.get_balance(from);
        store.set_balance(from, from_balance - amount);
        let to_balance = store.get_balance(to);
        store.set_balance(to, to_balance + amount);
    }
    save_to_database(from, to, amount).await;
    notify_transfer(from, to, amount).await;
}

async fn save_to_database(_from: u64, _to: u64, _amount: i64) { todo!() }
async fn notify_transfer(_from: u64, _to: u64, _amount: i64) { todo!() }

struct AccountStore;
impl AccountStore {
    fn get_balance(&self, _id: u64) -> i64 { todo!() }
    fn set_balance(&mut self, _id: u64, _balance: i64) { todo!() }
}
